snippet.title: Shakira, Burna Boy - Dai Dai (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Shakira, Burna Boy - Dai Dai (Official Video)
FIFA World Cup Official Song 2026

Music: https://songwhip.com/shakira/dai-dai

Letra/Lyrics: 
Oe oe e oe Oe oe e oe
You knew from the day you were born
That here in this place you belong
You been this brave all along
What broke you once made you strong

Dai dai iko
Dale allez lets go
Dai dai iko
Dale allez lets go!
Dai dai iko
Dale allez lets go
Dai dai iko
Dale allez lets go!

Come follow your desire
Theres a will there way
You are the owner of that fire
No one can take it away
Sweat and blood to write your story
That is how you paved the way
You are about to reach the glory
Only one step away

All the highs and lows
All the tears and the pain
You been there thru it all
Been thru it all
Just do it again
Now you got to believe (I believe)
Cuz you know what it takes
To be living the dream
At top of your game.

Feel it, got everything you needed
now bring it like you mean it
just like you mean it
Dale, no olvides lo que vales
Juega como tu sabes
Como tu sabes.

Energy is contagious you know
And it never fails no no
No one’s getting tired I know
Cuz you got that fire eio
Dream a little higher
Lets go lets go lets go
We’ve taken all that our hearts can hold
We can’t hold on to the past no more
From the dirt and the tears you make gold
You are more than flesh and bone

All the highs and lows
All the tears and the pain
You been there thru it all
Been thru it all
Just do it again
Now you got to believe ( I believe)
Cus you know what it takes
To be living the dream
At top of your game

Feel it, got everything you needed
Now bring it like you mean it
Just like you mean it
Dale no olvides lo que vales
juega como tu sabes
como tu sabes
Pele, Maradona
Maldini
Romario
Cristiano
Ronaldo
El Pibe
Iniesta
Beckham y Kaka
Messi
Mbape

Oe oe e oe
You knew from the day you were born
That here in this place you belong
You been this brave all along
What broke you once made you strong
Dai dai iko
Dale allez lets go
Dai dai iko
Dale allez lets go!
Dai dai iko
Dale allez lets go
Dai dai iko
Dale allez lets go!

snippet.title: Maa Inti Bangaaram - Official Trailer | Samantha | Raj Nidimoru | Nandini Reddy | Santhosh Narayanan
snippet.description:
Presenting you the Official Teaser Trailer of "Maa Inti Bangaram" Starring Samantha  & Others, Created by: Raj Nidimoru Directed by BV Nandini Reddy, Produced by Tralala Moving Pictures, Music Composed by Santhosh Narayanan.

This GOLD is BLOODY BOLD 💥💥
Coming to Theatres June 19 2026

snippet.title: New York Knicks at Cleveland Cavaliers
snippet.description: The New York Knicks take on the Cleveland Cavaliers at Rocket Arena for Game 4 of the East finals. New York leads the series 3-0. Cleveland relies on Donovan Mitchell to spark an upset and end their three-game skid as he averages 27.9 PPG.

localized.title: New York Knicks at Cleveland Cavaliers
localized.description: The New York Knicks take on the Cleveland Cavaliers at Rocket Arena for Game 4 of the East finals. New York leads the series 3-0. Cleveland relies on Donovan Mitchell to spark an upset and end their three-game skid as he averages 27.9 PPG.

snippet.title: Carolina Hurricanes at Montreal Canadiens
snippet.description: The East finals Game 3 gets underway as the Hurricanes face the Canadiens again at Bell Centre. The series is tied. Nick Suzuki has scored 29 goals this season and goes up against Sebastian Aho, who has scored 27 goals this season.

localized.title: Carolina Hurricanes at Montreal Canadiens
localized.description: The East finals Game 3 gets underway as the Hurricanes face the Canadiens again at Bell Centre. The series is tied. Nick Suzuki has scored 29 goals this season and goes up against Sebastian Aho, who has scored 27 goals this season.

snippet.title: SPIDER-MAN BRAND NEW DAY TRAILER: Sadie Sink, X-Men & Avengers Doomsday
snippet.description:
Spider-Man Brand New Day Trailer 2026. Marvel Sadie Sink New Character, Jean Grey X-Men in MCU, Avengers Doomsday Trailer, Doctor Doom, Spider-Man Venom Symbiote Arc & Avengers Secret Wars Teaser ► https://bit.ly/AwesomeSubscribe
The Boys Season 5 Episode 8 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yhotqbc_GmM&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczzDVHUrq_EeqCBhLjzXfKlR&index=1&pp=iAQBsAgC
X-Men 97 Season 2 Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FrAvy80EPxY&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczwWT3yd94Xc6n-ooI85uV_u&index=1&pp=iAQBsAgC
Spider-Man Brand New Day Cinemacon Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XnbV1nunjzk&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczwWT3yd94Xc6n-ooI85uV_u&index=1&&pp=iAQBsAgC
Clayface Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bZVn_fVn7SY&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczwCLH9RIm-7ui56ameRYmdQ&index=1&pp=iAQB0gcJCdQKAYcqIYzvsAgC
Avengers Doomsday CinemaCon Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dDrWFxkhCuA&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczwWT3yd94Xc6n-ooI85uV_u&index=1&pp=iAQBsAgC
Invincible Season 4 Episode 8 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=h1p_sVexsKA&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxJXJRwmzIBW9nsgB9Qu_lc&index=1&pp=iAQBsAgC
Lanterns Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kPkbV4TVQ3A&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczwCLH9RIm-7ui56ameRYmdQ&index=1&pp=iAQBsAgC
Daredevil Born Again Season 2 Episode 8 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aum5ef2fTaE&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxQXxyV_2D8kuEs_QsuQIyJ&index=1&pp=iAQBsAgC
House Of The Dragon Season 3 Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6ZVnOQ8DmFI&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxGuSDE8NtOuthqbKFChC0q&index=1&pp=iAQBsAgC
Emergency Awesome New Videos https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FeOfhzu7ZdY&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxQXxyV_2D8kuEs_QsuQIyJ&index=7

Covering New Spider-Man Brand New Day Trailer. New Footage, Scenes Explained. New Spider-Man AI and Suit Tech Explained. Spider-Man vs Damage Control, X-Men Jean Grey, Bruce Banner Savage Hulk, Sadie Sink New Character, Spider-Man vs Punisher. Tom Holland and Jon Bernthal reunion. New Spider-Man Suit First Look. Hulk Announcement. Why Bruce Banner would help Spider-Man, Spider-Man vs Hulk, Spider-Man Movies previous references to The Hulk. The Scorpion Returns, Tombstone, Jackal and other new villains.

Avengers Doomsday Trailer. Robert Downey Jr Doctor Doom, New Black Panther, X-Men, Doctor Strange, Avengers Secret Wars First Look, Battleworld MCU. Fantastic Four, Franklin Richards. Ian McKellen Magneto, Patrick Stewart Professor X, Kesley Grammer Beast, Thor Returns, Mystique, Cyclops, Nightcrawler, Original X-Men.

Why Marvel is rebooting the MCU with Avengers 6 Secret Wars. What's going to change with all the Avengers, New Iron Man, X-Men Mutants like Wolverine, Deadpool, Fantastic Four, Ghost Rider, Spider-Man and other characters. Lots more Marvel Trailers coming Avengers Doomsday Trailer, More Spider-Man Brand New Day Trailer videos soon!

My Spider-Man Noir Breakdown and Easter Eggs videos will start posting this week too!

Unstable SMP Members
➜ @wemmbumc 
➜ @FlameFragsMC 
➜ @ParrotX2 
➜ @Spokeishere 





possible spoilers below this point

Features: @jamatopecan @MapiccMc @jumperwho @devMCchamp2 ItsAli @found2fast(twitch) @n3tm3tr1x (https://www.youtube.com/@n3tm3tr1x) & all of the trusted members!

music: 
Hollow Knight: Silksong soundtrack by Christopher Larkin (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Q6is6K8jbho&pp=ygUTc2lsa3Nvbmcgc291bmR0cmFjaw%3D%3D)
Ivory /  @ivoryfrill  &  @MythrodakTV  
DM DOKURO /  @DMDOKURO  
Chris Christodoulou /  @AstronautDown  
Pascal Stiefel /  @Plasma3Music  
Lena Raine / @LenaRaine 
C418 / @C418
Peter McConnell

This is a video on the Unstable Universe: a staged Minecraft server where Spoke, Wemmbu, FlameFrags, and ParrotX2 aim to tell the best stories possible. btw a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

spoke

snippet.title: 52nd American Music Awards
snippet.description: Honoring the most influential artists and songs of today, alongside unforgettable performances and special moments, in a multi-genre, cross-generational celebration of music; scheduled performers include Hootie & the Blowfish, Katseye and more.

snippet.title: Reacting to Jason's Moris & Power! - DBD #earlyaccess
snippet.description:
BHVR invited me and other folks in the DBD Creator Program to have an #earlyaccess look at the 10th year anniversary Killer, The Slasher aka Jason! Here's my brief breakdown of everything exciting that I could see in the footage that they provided us.

TIMESTAMPS:
0:00 Intro
0:42 Ability 1: Omnipresent Evil
3:44 Ability 2: Spike Throw
4:28 Impalement
4:40 Mini Mori A
4:53 Mini Mori B
5:02 Full Mori

My Livestreams on YouTube:  @OtzStreams 
Watch live on Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/Otzdarva
Join our community: http://discord.gg/Otzdarva
My DBD info site: https://otzdarva.com/

snippet.title: First Look at DBD Jason Gameplay & Mori!
snippet.description:
In this video, I was allowed access to get an early look at the upcoming new killer "The Slasher" aka Jason in Dead By Daylight!

Find out more information on the upcoming Jason chapter here:
https://x.com/DeadbyDaylight/status/2058201762499002786?s=20
